title: justicia alchorneeticola
intro: Justicia alchorneeticola, also known as the False Madder or Wild Pigeonwings, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Justicia alchorneeticola include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
